meaning: n.鐗规潈,鐗瑰埆寰呴亣,鍩烘湰鍏皯鏉冨姏,鐗瑰厤vt.缁欎笌...鐗规潈,鐗瑰厤
examples: He arrogated the privilege to himself alone.
She was cocooned in a private world of privilege.
Her attitudes solidified through privilege and habit.
"He was the greatest guitarist I ever had the privilege of working with, " he says.
I've had the privilege of being President of the RNLI branch in Redcar for many years.
